# SnakeConverter

> SnakeConverter is a free, privacy-first browser-based utility platform with 50+ tools for PDF manipulation, unit conversion, text processing, developer utilities, calculators, and color tools. No file uploads to servers, no accounts required — everything runs client-side in the browser.

## About

- **URL**: https://snakeconverter.com
- **Language**: English and Turkish (TR/EN switcher on every page)
- **Mascot**: A friendly animated snake that plays autonomous canvas animations
- **License**: Free to use, all processing happens in the user's browser
- **Tech**: Vanilla JavaScript, Tailwind CSS, jsPDF, PDF.js, Cloudflare Pages

## Tool Categories

### PDF Tools — https://snakeconverter.com/pdf.html
- Excel to PDF (xlsx, xls, csv — full Unicode/Turkish character support)
- Image to PDF (PNG, JPEG, WebP, GIF, BMP)
- Merge PDF (combine multiple PDFs into one)
- Split PDF (extract pages or custom ranges)
- Encrypt / Decrypt PDF (AES-256 password protection)
- Share PDF (generate a public shareable link via Cloudflare R2)

### Unit Converters — https://snakeconverter.com/units.html
- Length (km, m, cm, mm, ft, in, mi, yd)
- Weight / Mass (kg, g, lb, oz, ton, stone)
- Temperature (°C, °F, K, °R)
- Area (m², km², ft², acre, hectare)
- Volume (L, mL, gallon, cup, fluid oz)
- Speed (km/h, mph, m/s, knot, Mach)
- Data Storage (B, KB, MB, GB, TB, PB)
- Time / Duration (ms, s, min, hour, day, week, month, year)
- Energy (J, kJ, kcal, kWh, BTU)
- Pressure (Pa, bar, psi, atm, mmHg)
- Cooking Measurements (cups, tbsp, tsp, mL)
- Shoe Size Converter (US, EU, UK)
- Typography Units (px, pt, em, rem, vw)

### Calculators — https://snakeconverter.com/calc.html
- BMI Calculator (Body Mass Index with visual gauge)
- Age Calculator (exact age from birthdate)
- Percentage Calculator (X% of Y, increase/decrease)
- Loan / EMI Calculator
- Currency Converter (live rates via open API)
- Date Difference Calculator
- Time Zone Converter
- Statistics Calculator (mean, median, mode, std dev)
- Aspect Ratio Calculator
- Number to Words (English)
- Quadratic Equation Solver
- Scientific Calculator

### Text & Utility Tools — https://snakeconverter.com/tools.html
- Word Counter (words, characters, sentences, reading time)
- Text Case Converter (UPPER, lower, Title, camelCase, snake_case)
- Base64 Encoder / Decoder
- QR Code Generator (download as PNG)
- Password Generator (strength meter, custom rules)
- Random Number Generator (range, count, unique)
- Unix Timestamp Converter
- Morse Code Encoder / Decoder
- Text ↔ Binary Converter
- Palindrome Checker
- Duplicate Line Remover
- Text Reverser
- String Inspector (char codes, Unicode info)
- Coin Flip simulator
- Dice Roller (1–6 sides, multiple dice)
- Stopwatch (millisecond precision)
- Countdown Timer

### Developer Tools — https://snakeconverter.com/dev.html
- JSON Formatter / Validator
- HTML Encoder / Decoder
- URL Encoder / Decoder
- Regex Tester
- Color Picker / Converter
- CSS Minifier
- JSON ↔ CSV Converter
- Diff Checker (line-by-line text comparison)
- CRON Expression Parser
- JWT Encoder / Decoder
- Character Diff

### Color Tools — https://snakeconverter.com/color.html
- HEX ↔ RGB ↔ HSL Converter
- Color Palette Generator
- Contrast Ratio Checker (WCAG AA/AAA)
- Gradient Builder
- Color Blindness Simulator
- Random Palette Generator
- Tint & Shade Generator

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Is SnakeConverter free?**
Yes, all tools are 100% free with no account required.

**Do you store uploaded files?**
No. All processing happens locally in your browser. Files never leave your device (except PDF Share, which uses Cloudflare R2 and expires in 7 days).

**Does it support Turkish characters?**
Yes. All PDF tools embed the DejaVu Sans font to ensure correct rendering of Turkish, Arabic, Greek, and other Unicode characters.

**What browsers are supported?**
Any modern browser: Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge. No plugins required.

**Is there an API?**
Not currently. All tools are browser-based. A REST API is planned for the Pro tier.

## Sitemap

- https://snakeconverter.com/ — Home / Tool Directory
- https://snakeconverter.com/pdf.html — PDF Tools
- https://snakeconverter.com/tools.html — Text & Utility Tools
- https://snakeconverter.com/units.html — Unit Converters
- https://snakeconverter.com/calc.html — Calculators
- https://snakeconverter.com/dev.html — Developer Tools
- https://snakeconverter.com/color.html — Color Tools
